name: All Bake Technologies Inc
description: All Bake Technologies is a specialized distributor of bakery equipment, offering a comprehensive range of solutions from small retailers to large industrial productions. Their product lineup includes sheeters, mixers, ovens, and proofers, ensuring that bakeries of all sizes can find the equipment they need to enhance performance and efficiency.

name: EM Bakery Equipment
description: EM Bakery specializes in high-quality European baking equipment, providing a diverse range of products such as rack ovens, mixers, and bun machines. With over 40 years of experience, the company serves artisan bakeries, factories, and supermarkets, ensuring customer satisfaction through top-notch servicing.

name: Baker Perkins
description: Baker Perkins is a prominent manufacturer of bakery equipment, providing innovative systems that enhance dough handling and production consistency. Their technology is trusted by leading brands in the baking sector, ensuring high-quality bread and confectionery production.

name: Brook Food & Bakery Equipment
description: Brook Food is the largest supplier of new and used bakery equipment in the UK and Europe, offering a comprehensive service to support new business setups. With thousands of products in stock and a team of experts, they ensure customers have access to the right equipment and tailored financing solutions.

name: FRITSCH
description: FRITSCH specializes in producing high-quality bakery equipment, making it a key player in the global market for both artisan and industrial bakeries. Their innovative machines are designed to enhance the production of premium bakery products, supported by a robust network that ensures close customer collaboration and the development of new recipes and solutions.

name: Bakewise Pty Ltd
description: Bakewise is dedicated to providing Australian customers with a comprehensive range of professional bakery equipment, emphasizing reliability, durability, and value. They offer not only the equipment but also spare parts and after-sales service, ensuring a one-stop solution for all bakery and pastry production needs.

name: AMF Bakery Systems
description: AMF Bakery Systems will be showcasing their latest commercial bakery equipment at the International Bakery Exhibition (IBA) in Munich, highlighting their commitment to providing integrated solutions that enhance bakery operations and product quality. Their AMF Fusion and AMF Flex technologies offer reliable mixers and advanced dough handling systems, ensuring efficiency and accuracy for various types of baked goods.

name: Mecatherm
description: Mecatherm is dedicated to being the reference solutions provider for the global industrial bakery, offering innovative equipment and production lines for various types of bread, including baguettes and banana bread, with impressive capacities. Their commitment to teamwork and continuous improvement enhances their ability to meet the challenges of the bakery industry.

name: All Round Bakery Supply Services c.c
description: All Round Bakery Supply Services is an independent supplier and manufacturer that has been servicing and reconditioning bakery equipment since 1994. They offer a comprehensive range of bakery and deli equipment, along with spare parts, ensuring they meet the diverse needs of any bakery.

name: Kolkata Kitchen Equipments - India
description: Kolkata Kitchen Equipments is a manufacturer that specializes in providing commercial kitchen equipment, including bakery equipment.
